unit.name: LSTM skip paths, state-space models, and wrap-up
unit.description: Connects LSTM information flow to ResNets and modern RNN-like state-space models.
unit.summary: The instructor connects LSTM direct information paths to ResNet skip connections: both copy or add values across parts of the computation to improve information and gradient flow [ts=4098s] [ts=4111s]. The analogy differs in axis because ResNets skip across layer depth, while LSTMs help across long time sequences [ts=4132s] [ts=4142s]. The final topic is the resurgence of RNN-like ideas through modern state-space models, motivated by unlimited context and linear scaling with sequence length [ts=4152s] [ts=4174s] [ts=4197s]. RWKV and Mamba are cited as examples aiming for linear-time sequence modeling rather than transformer-style quadratic scaling [ts=4224s] [ts=4233s]. The wrap-up states that RNNs offer flexible architecture design, vanilla RNNs are simple but weak, variants such as LSTMs and Mamba selectively pass information, gradients can vanish or explode, BPTT is often needed, and better sequence-reasoning architectures remain active research [ts=4258s] [ts=4276s] [ts=4289s].

key_points.text: LSTM direct paths are analogous to ResNet skip connections for improving information flow.
RNN-like state-space models are motivated by unlimited context and linear sequence-length scaling.
RWKV and Mamba are examples of modern linear-time sequence models.
Vanilla RNNs are simple but weak; variants selectively pass information and address gradient-flow issues.

kp_catalog.name: Modern RNN-like state-space models
kp_catalog.description: RWKV, Mamba, and related models that revive RNN-like linear-time sequence modeling.
kp_catalog.importance_rationale: Important because modern RNN-like state-space models synthesizes rWKV, Mamba, and related models that revive RNN-like linear-time sequence modeling into an end-to-end method or integrated recipe.

kp_catalog.name: LSTM gates and cell state
kp_catalog.description: Gated recurrent architecture that selectively writes, forgets, outputs, and preserves information.
kp_catalog.importance_rationale: Important because lSTM gates and cell state formalizes how gated recurrent architecture that selectively writes, forgets, outputs, and preserves information, which later units use as core machinery rather than background context.
